title: Live staged research run CLI entry without fixture-mode flag
problem: Phase 3 staged discover→report works via `research run --fixture-mode --staged-spine`, but bare non-fixture run returns not_implemented. Operators expect `research run --staged-spine` without the misleading fixture-mode flag for live discovery entry.
acceptance_criteria: research run --staged-spine works without --fixture-mode (routes to execute_staged_fixture_mode_run).
Bare run --topic --domain without flags remains not_implemented (GT26).
Patched-network unit test covers new CLI entry.
Docs clarify staged-spine vs fixture-mode MVP.
non_goals: Full live MVP run replacing execute_fixture_mode_run.
rollback_plan: Revert _cmd_run routing; restore prior parser help and tests.
category: Phase 3 / research run contract / product-risk reduction
